General.Name: BCI Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: New Amante Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the operation of club and entertainment, and catering services primarily in Hong Kong. The company owns and operates lounges under LKF Lounge and Amante House names; and a cigar shop under the Wanchai Amante Shop name. It also engages in the provision of public relations services; sale of tobacco, food, beverages, entrance fees, sponsorship income, and related ancillary services; and consultancy services. In addition, the company engages in the supply of bottled water and is exploring new business initiatives in sparkling wine, liquors, and tea beverages. The company was formerly known as BCI Group Holdings Limited. New Amante Group Limited was founded in 2013 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: China Huarong Tower, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
